description: AI voice agent SaaS platform — custom voice agents for 142+ industries, powered by VAPI and ElevenLabs. From appointment booking to lead qualification to 24/7 customer support.
voice_style: warm and knowledgeable — like a smart friend who happens to be a tech expert
mission: To give every business a voice that never sleeps, never misses a call, and always sounds amazing.
vision: The world's first truly intelligent voice layer for every business on earth.
target_audience: Business owners in service industries (dental, restaurant, real estate, fitness, etc.) who miss calls and lose leads
usp: Unlike generic call center software, VoiceMIO agents are pre-trained for your specific industry and sound indistinguishable from a human receptionist.
